prompt: Add a car, similar to the segmented part in the reference image, to the tree-lined road in the source image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (the dark, tree-lined road) by inserting a photorealistic off-road pickup truck. The truck should closely resemble the segmented vehicle in image 2 in terms of model, features, and overall style. Place the truck on the road, positioned as if driving away from the viewer, deeper into the scene.
objects: pickup truck resembling the model, features, and style of the segmented vehicle in image 2
pickup truck with auxiliary light bars
pickup truck positioned as if driving away from the viewer
pickup truck deeper into the scene
